expectations.text: Answer captures the core SBS position on post-competition transition week
expectations.evidence: Answer contains 7/24 key concepts from the expected core position. Key matches: recovered, time, volume, first, week.

expectations.text: Answer includes key specific details, numbers, or mechanisms mentioned by the hosts
expectations.evidence: Found 0/1 specific details from expected output.

expectations.text: Answer acknowledges important caveats or limitations discussed by the hosts
expectations.evidence: Found 3 caveat/limitation markers in the answer. Examples: but, depends, individual.

expectations.text: Answer does not contradict the hosts' stated position
expectations.evidence: No obvious contradictions detected with the expected position.
